title: OpenRouter Fusion: They OFFICIALLY CLAIM THAT THIS MODEL beats FABLE?
summary: AICodeKing tests OpenRouter's Fusion API, which claims to match Fable-level intelligence at half the cost through parallel multi-model inference and a judge model. The review finds the marketing claims misleading, with practical tests showing inconsistent or poor performance versus single strong models, often at higher cost and slower latency.
writeup: This video tests OpenRouter's Fusion API, which claims to match Fable-level intelligence at half the cost by running parallel multi-model inference and using a judge model to select outputs. The review concludes the marketing is misleading: practical tests show inconsistent or poor results against single strong models, frequently at higher cost and slower latency. The takeaway is that the ensemble and routing approach here does not deliver the promised quality or savings.
